privileged_info_summary: All metadata author claims have been verified against authoritative sources. The task targets four landmark computer science papers: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017) - authors Shazeer, Parmar, and Uszkoreit are confirmed as the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th co-authors; (2) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., 2016) - authors Zhang, Ren, and Sun are confirmed as the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th authors; (3) 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids' (Watson & Crick, 1953) - Crick is confirmed as the 2nd author; (4) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014) - authors Pouget-Abadie and Mirza are confirmed as the 2nd and 3rd authors. The task data is synthetic, created by the seed_library.py script that populates a Zotero database with real papers but only their first authors, which the task operator must then manually supplement.
